beats.intent: Mateo wakes up to an unusual dream and can't shake the feeling it's more than just a dream
Mateo starts experiencing strange, unexplainable glitches on his computer and phone
Mateo arrives at the lab to find Dr. Baeza working on a new experiment
Mateo asks Dr. Baeza about her project and she's hesitant to share details
Javi teases Mateo about his lack of technical knowledge
Chief Ortega arrives, asking about the project's progress and potential risks
Mateo starts experiencing more glitches and strange occurrences at home
Mateo tries to troubleshoot the issues but can't find a logical explanation
Mateo confides in Zoë about his experiences and she offers to help him investigate
Mateo and Zoë start digging into the lab's experiments and possible connections to Mateo's glitches
Dr. Baeza warns them about the risks of meddling with her project
Mateo and Zoë meet with Marina to discuss their findings and potential consequences
Mateo starts experiencing more intense, disturbing glitches and visions
Mateo realizes he needs to take drastic action to stop the anomalies
